subcodes.first_line: O serene leaf! As thou art enraptured by the Kingdom of Abhá, thou art the pride of womankind and art turned towards the Supreme Concourse, the foremost among them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه مطمئنه چون منجذب بملکوت ابهائی فخر نساای و متوجه بملا اعلاای سرحلقه
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @service to others; to the Cause of God
